title: GTA Online: The Kortz Center Heist
headline: GTA Online: The Kortz Center Heist
subtitle: New Vehicles
content:
The Kortz Center Heist’s grand unveiling arrives alongside a fleet of new vehicles for you to add to your collection, including the Benefactor LRC GT (Super), Grotti Cartuccia GT (Sports), Albany Merula (Sedan), Ocelot E-Stride (SUV), and Benefactor Läufer (Van).

In the weeks ahead, look for a new supercar model joining the roster of decommissioned Law Enforcement Vehicles, new drift vehicles, and more.
